runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues } from "../types";

type FormValues = typeof registrationInitialValues;

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: FormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="your.email@example.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role radio group -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="[
          { value: 'user', label: 'User' },
          { value: 'admin', label: 'Admin' },
          { value: 'contributor', label: 'Contributor' },
        ]"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: shown only when role is contributor -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Information"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency: shown only when newsletter is true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="[
          { value: 'daily', label: 'Daily' },
          { value: 'weekly', label: 'Weekly' },
          { value: 'monthly', label: 'Monthly' },
        ]"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues } from "@/registration/types";

type FormValues = typeof registrationInitialValues;

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: FormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="your.email@example.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role radio group -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="[
          { value: 'user', label: 'User' },
          { value: 'admin', label: 'Admin' },
          { value: 'contributor', label: 'Contributor' },
        ]"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: shown only when role is contributor -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Information"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency: shown only when newsletter is true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="[
          { value: 'daily', label: 'Daily' },
          { value: 'weekly', label: 'Weekly' },
          { value: 'monthly', label: 'Monthly' },
        ]"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues } from "@/registration/types";

type FormValues = typeof registrationInitialValues;

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: FormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="your.email@example.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role radio group -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="[
          { value: 'user', label: 'User' },
          { value: 'admin', label: 'Admin' },
          { value: 'contributor', label: 'Contributor' },
        ]"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: shown only when role is contributor -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Information"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency: shown only when newsletter is true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="[
          { value: 'daily', label: 'Daily' },
          { value: 'weekly', label: 'Weekly' },
          { value: 'monthly', label: 'Monthly' },
        ]"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>
